default_review_notes: No account sign-in is required unless noted for the specific app.

review_note_snippets.owner_hosted_ai: AI processing is performed by the developer's own private/local model service. User data is not sent to third-party AI model providers or third-party AI APIs.
review_note_snippets.subscription_payments: The app uses Apple's in-app purchase system for subscription payments when subscriptions are offered.
review_note_snippets.legal_links: The app purchase flow includes functional links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.
